title: The "Parse, Don't Validate" Paradigm
description: Master the "Parse, Don't Validate" paradigm to transform external unknown inputs into trusted, typed domain models. Utilize schema-first libraries (e.g., Zod, Valibot) to enforce data contracts at the system edge.
objectives: Master the "Parse, Don't Validate" paradigm to transform external unknown inputs into trusted, typed domain models.
Utilize schema-first libraries (e.g., Zod, Valibot) to enforce data contracts at the system edge.
